name: Remove template task board surface and generic task CRUD
motivation: The current app shell defaults to a generic project board with template task CRUD that is not part of the Superfield KB PRD workflows. Keeping this surface increases maintenance cost, confuses product scope, and pollutes schema/entity usage with non-PRD concepts.
intended_experience: When users open the app, they land on PRD-aligned product surfaces (wiki, campaign analysis, settings/admin as authorized) without a generic task board. Backend no longer exposes template task CRUD endpoints.
constraints: Do not regress PRD workflows for wiki, annotation, campaign analysis, passkey auth, or compliance.
Remove only template board functionality and its direct dependencies.
Keep migration and deletion steps safe for existing environments.
